title: Errors, Cleanup, and Root-Cause Debugging · Mastery Check
summary: Diagnose malformed records and failed operations while keeping cleanup, user recovery, and causal evidence intact. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Differentiate syntax, reference, type, range, aggregate, DOM, and domain errors by evidence and recovery boundary.
Throw Error objects with stable messages, structured context, and preserved causes without exposing secrets.
Place try, catch, and finally around the smallest recoverable boundary without swallowing failures or overriding control flow.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.javascript:
// javascript-basics cumulative stakeholder program.
// Add one runnable behavior, assertion, changed case, and evidence return per activity.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Import 7 rows containing one malformed record and one simulated storage failure. Preserve the original error cause, clean up resources, recover only the expected row failure, and let programming defects surface. Competency probe: Release listeners, timers, streams, locks, and disposable resources on success, failure, and cancellation.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for release listeners, timers, streams, locks, and disposable resources on success, failure, and cancellation.

content.text: Import 7 rows containing one malformed record and one simulated storage failure. content.title: Fault-isolation decision
content.text: Select evidence that identifies a cause, not a patch that only hides the Resource Cleanup symptom in a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow during this quiz case.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: MDN JavaScript Guide — Controls language sequence, collections, objects, promises, modules, resource management, and advanced concepts.

hints: Name the Resource Cleanup precondition or invariant that the quiz case must preserve.

Preserve the original error cause, clean up resources, recover only the expected row failure, and let programming defects surface. Competency probe: Release listeners, timers, streams, locks, and disposable resources on success, failure, and cancellation.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Garbage collection automatically cancels all external resources.

stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Release listeners, timers, streams, locks, and disposable resources on success, failure, and cancellation.

options.text: For diagnose the hidden failure, apply Resource Cleanup without its stated preconditions, omit the a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. Run the Resource Cleanup boundary case for a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write the quiz evidence note for Resource Cleanup: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Import 5 rows containing one malformed record and one simulated storage failure. Preserve the original error cause, clean up resources, recover only the expected row failure, and let programming defects surface. Competency probe: Release listeners, timers, streams, locks, and disposable resources on success, failure, and cancellation.
steps.why: Retrieving Resource Cleanup through the concrete a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Release listeners, timers, streams, locks, and disposable resources on success, failure, and cancellation.
